species: Previous analyses of tissue-specific RNA-seq libraries identified 647 predicted genes that were differentially expressed in silk glands of the Western black widow, Latrodectus hesperus.
tissue: Previous analyses of tissue-specific RNA-seq libraries identified 647 predicted genes that were differentially expressed in silk glands of the Western black widow, Latrodectus hesperus.
sample_source: Adult L. hesperus females were collected on the University of California, Riverside, campus and were fed commercially available crickets.
